name: multi-agent-desk
description: A unified workspace for AI coding agents, profiles, sessions, and usage.

scripts.project:verify: npm run workflow:verify && npm run dashboard && npm run dashboard:verify
scripts.scaffold:check: npm run scaffold:structure && npm run go:fmt-check && npm run go:test && npm run web:check && npm run desktop:fmt-check && npm run desktop:check
scripts.scaffold:build: npm run go:build && npm run web:build && npm run desktop:build
scripts.scaffold:verify: npm run scaffold:check && npm run scaffold:build
scripts.ci:static: npm run ci:actions && npm run ci:codeowners
scripts.ci:verify: npm run ci:static && npm run ci:fixtures && npm run ci:links && npm run ci:licenses
